implementation_validation: PASS required before handoff: 545 regression cases, 43 NP cases, 1,210 construction assertions, 168 note/test alignment, ten evaluation/scalar/question zero-weight probes, historical reachability audits, panel workflow, promotion and release gates, documentation links, and repository verification.
linguistic_confidence: No construction gained linguistic evidence or status. All ten probes have evidence weight zero. Composition, lexical-scope, source/runtime, scalar-domain, identity-question, scheduling-question, and postposed-existential mismatches remain unresolved.
overclaim_review_scope: Inspected exact templates and complete parser output for ten acceptability, scalar, evaluation, opinion, identity, scheduling, temporal, and existential-question labels. Recorded implementation reachability separately from source support and preserved every observed mismatch without promotion or normalization.
unresolved_release_questions: Thirteen retained labels still have no direct standardized case.
AcceptabilityClause still merges optional subject/action material with 都得 without a settled linguistic scope.
EvaluationWithDouSyun and ScalarEvaluation retain price-domain and broad-scalar analyses not established by their checked sources.
ScalarValueQuestion still groups heterogeneous scalar domains under one label.
OpinionQuestion and IdentityWhQuestion may duplicate ordinary cognition-plus-question or copular/question composition.
SchedulingQuestion requires runtime elements absent from the checked scheduling example.
TimeToActionFrame lacks a verified exact source for its dedicated 係時候 + action wrapper.
PostposedExistentialQuestion is reachable, but checked reference evidence establishes preverbal 有冇 rather than the postposed route.
The full dormant-label review remains due by handoff sequence 23.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused while collection proceeds.
